calendar.matters:
APPLICATION FOR A STAY OF ENFORCEMENT PENDING A DECISION ON THEIR PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE UNDER CCP 1085 AND 1094.5
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christophe John Cannnon, Esq., Sugarman & Cannon, 415-362-6252 for Petitioner Robert Korman, et al (via Zoom)
Peter R Miljanich, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, (415) 554-4700, peter.miljanich@sfcityatty.org, for Respondent City and County of San Francisco, et al

Counsel for defendant CCSF presents to the Court a stipulation and [proposed] order regarding administrative record and enforcement.

Not ARGUED. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

APPLICATION FOR A STAY OF ENFORCEMENT PENDING A DECISION ON THEIR PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE UNDER CCP 1085 AND 1094.5

is DENIED. Petitioner to set the Petition for hearing promptly after the Administrative Record is provided by the City. The Court expects the Record to be provided no later than December 15, 2022 as represented in opposition. Untimely and improperly filed reply is stricken. The City's Planning Department shall not forward any enforcement fees or penalties to the City's Bureau of Delinquent Revenue or otherwise engage in any collection activity arising out of the enforcement activities at issue in this case until the Court issues a decision on the merits.

Order re: November 7, 2022 Motion for Stay of Enforcement is signed

Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)

APPLICATION FOR A STAY OF ENFORCEMENT PENDING A DECISION ON THEIR PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE UNDER CCP 1085 AND 1094.5
Off Calendar Oct-24-2022 Continued To Nov-07-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

APPLICATION FOR A STAY OF ENFORCEMENT PENDING A DECISION ON THEIR PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE UNDER CCP 1085 AND 1094.5 is Transferred to be heard in department 501 on the November 7, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all real property matters save construction defect per San Francisco Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
